summary: Workflow Builder Enhancements - All features tested and working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified including Workflow Settings panel (roles, teams, categories), Form Node configuration with Add Field, is_trigger checkbox, Options for select fields, and Conditional Sub-Fields section.

issues: 'Assign to Teams' section shows 'No teams available' when no teams exist - this is expected behavior but could show a helpful message to create teams first

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/workflows with form node containing is_trigger field
Backend: Complete workflow with teams, categories, and sub-fields creates successfully
Frontend: Workflow Settings button appears in editor header
Frontend: Workflow Settings panel shows 'Assign to Roles' section with checkboxes
Frontend: Workflow Settings panel shows 'Assign to Teams' section
Frontend: Workflow Settings panel shows 'Trigger by Category' section with L1/L2 categories
Frontend: Selecting a role in settings updates workflow via API (toast: 'Workflow settings updated')
Frontend: Form node configuration shows 'Add Field' button
Frontend: Form fields with Dropdown type show 'Options' section with 'Add Option' button
Frontend: Form fields have expandable 'Conditional Sub-Fields' section
Frontend: Sub-fields section shows 'Add Sub-Field' button
Frontend: Sub-fields helper text explains conditional behavior
critical_code_review_comments: Backend models correctly include ConditionalSubField with parent_value, is_trigger fields
WorkflowCreate/Update models include assigned_teams and trigger_categories arrays
WorkflowResponse includes assigned_team_names and trigger_category_names for display
Helper functions get_team_names_by_ids and get_category_names_by_ids resolve IDs to names
Frontend FormNodeConfig component properly handles sub_fields array with parent_value condition
Workflow Settings Sheet correctly displays roles, teams, and categories with checkboxes
API integration working - settings changes trigger PATCH request and show success toast
SMTP email sending is MOCKED (as expected per requirements)
seed_data_creation: Test workflows created during backend testing with prefix 'TEST_' - automatically cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workflow Builder Enhancements fully functional. New features: 1) Workflow Settings panel with role/team/category assignment, 2) Form Node with conditional sub-fields and trigger markers. Backend APIs support assigned_teams, trigger_categories, and form fields with sub_fields array. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / Fmtvvl171**. SMTP is MOCKED.

workflow_settings_panel.settings_button: Working - Settings button in editor header
workflow_settings_panel.assign_to_roles: Working - Checkboxes for service provider roles
workflow_settings_panel.assign_to_teams: Working - Shows teams or 'No teams available'
workflow_settings_panel.trigger_by_category: Working - L1 and L2 categories with checkboxes
workflow_settings_panel.api_integration: Working - PATCH request on checkbox change, success toast shown

form_node_config.add_field_button: Working - Adds new field to form
form_node_config.options_section: Working - Appears for Dropdown type with 'Add Option' button
form_node_config.conditional_subfields: Working - Expandable section with 'Add Sub-Field' button
